title.en: The Heart of the Bioluminescent Grove

description.ko: 유기적 식물과 미묘한 액체 빛이 만나 고요하고 무중력인 대기 속에서 생명의 리드미컬한 호흡을 시각적으로 표현했습니다.
description.en: A visual representation of life's rhythmic breath, where organic vegetation meets ethereal liquid light in a serene, weightless atmosphere.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, 'The Heart of the Bioluminescent Grove.' A pulsating, semi-transparent lung-like structure woven from #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular vines, floating in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent mist. It rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that swirl like liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes revealing internal capillary networks of glowing sap. Octane render, 8k, divine natural atmosphere, hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts.
